params.TgtPrompt: Select target creature to redirect damage from
params.SpellDescription: All damage that would be dealt to target creature this turn is dealt to you instead.
params.StackDescription: All damage that would be dealt to {c:Targeted} this turn is dealt to {p:You} instead.

params.Description: If you control a Plains, you may tap an untapped creature you control rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
